title: Close the remaining PRD runtime gaps in the AgentOS root repository

tasks.title: Materialize runtime SpecPilot artifacts and close the validation gap
tasks.goal: Make the AgentOS repository self-host the PRD-defined SpecPilot flow with real runtime artifacts and a complete validation gate.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver runtime SpecPilot artifacts and a complete validation gate verified by npm run doctor and npm run validate, preserving the current PRD scope and no-new-dependencies constraint.
agentGoal.outcome: The root repository contains canonical SPEC, PLAN and harness state with green doctor and validation gates.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor, npm run validate and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: Do not edit files outside docs/, .harness/, scripts/ and package.json.
Keep the active task contract on agentGoal and never reintroduce codexGoal.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Use the smallest repository-level change that closes the missing runtime and validation gaps.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: The root repository contains runtime SPEC, PLAN and harness state files aligned with the PRD.
The active sprint uses agentGoal, specRefs, context.readOnly, editable files, acceptanceCriteria, verification.commands and evidence.
The default validate command runs template, context and secrets checks.
Review evidence records fresh doctor and validation results.

evidence.note: Context validation passed after runtime SPEC, PLAN and sprint state were created.
Doctor passed after the root repository gained canonical runtime artifacts.
Template, context and secrets checks passed through the default gate.
